title: feat: PRODUCT-PAGE - Sanity product enhancements + storefront simplification
summary: Improve product detail experience: show images/videos + consolidated details sections (Freshness & Quality, Cooking Guide, Delivery Options, From the Grower). Remove product variant and bundle UI from storefront (deprecate schema but keep non-destructive server-side). Add seller contact (Cal.com appointment + Quick Chat), Google Maps link, ratings badge, suggested products auto-generation, and dynamic stock decrement when buyer adds to cart.
description: This PR implements Phase A: frontend + content model plan to make product pages focused on: high-quality media, consolidated product details, and direct grower contact. Variants and bundles will no longer be displayed on the storefront; they are treated as deprecated (no destructive Sanity schema removal in phase A). The PR includes unit and Playwright e2e tests to validate the UX and AI/chat behaviors, and documentation + migration steps for later schema migration (non-destructive, with backfill script example).
motivation: Connect growers directly with buyers via better product details, immediate contact (bookings + quick chat), auto-suggested complementary products, and accurate dynamic stock display. Simplify storefront by removing variant/bundle complexity for buyers.
files_to_create_or_modify: src/app/(shop)/product/[slug]/page.tsx  # Update UI: remove variant & bundle UI, add compact sections, GrowerCard usage
src/components/product/GrowerCard.tsx  # New: Grower UI with Google Maps link, rating + badge, Cal.com book button (mailto fallback), Quick Chat button that opens ChatContext
src/components/product/ProductDetailsSections.tsx # New: Freshness & Quality, Cooking Guide, Delivery Options sections
src/components/product/MediaGallery.tsx  # New/Simplified: display images + YouTube/Vimeo/embed videos; fallback placeholder
src/hooks/useAutoSuggestedProducts.ts  # New: server-side or Sanity-driven suggested products logic
src/lib/product/stock-sync.ts  # New: helper to adjust product stock locally and emit Firebase/backend sync events
src/lib/ai/rag-service.ts  # Update: ensure suggested products and grower context used by RAG (if applicable)
src/lib/analytics/chatbot-analytics.ts  # Update: log Quick Chat opens and booking clicks
src/app/api/ai/gemini/route.ts  # No change or small update: ensure Chat Quick-Open remains proxied through existing API
src/app/(shop)/product/__tests__/GrowerCard.test.tsx  # New unit tests (Jest + React Testing Library)
e2e/tests/product-contact.spec.ts  # Update: ensure Cal.com + Quick Chat are validated
e2e/tests/product-details.spec.ts  # New e2e tests verifying sections & suggested products
docs/PRODUCT-PAGE-ENHANCEMENT.md  # New: design and developer notes + Sanity migration plan
scripts/migrate-deprecate-bundles-variants.js  # Optional: script to mark bundle/variant fields as deprecated in Sanity (non-destructive)
progress.txt  # Update entry describing work and tests added

sanity_schema_recommendations.principles: Non-destructive changes first. Add new fields where needed and mark legacy fields as deprecated instead of removing them in Phase A. Provide migration script and data backfill plan for Phase B when ready to fully remove fields.

add.media: array of image/video objects { type: 'image'|'video', url, thumbnail, provider (youtube|vimeo|file) } - canonical for storefront media
add.freshnessInfo: object { harvestWindow, shelfLife, storageInstructions, qualityIndicators: string[] }
add.preparationInfo: object { difficultyLevel, cookingTime, preparationTips: string[], recipeIdeas: string[] }
add.deliveryOptions: object { sameDayDeliveryEligible: boolean, deliveryZones: string[], perishable: boolean, deliveryNotes: string }
add.growerRef: reference to grower doc (existing) - ensures grower contact details available for storefront
add.suggestedProductsEnabled: boolean (default true) - allows auto suggestions or curated list override

add_or_ensure.googleMapsQuery: computed during ingest or used to build link client-side

migration_plan: Phase A (non-destructive): Add new fields (media, freshnessInfo, preparationInfo, deliveryOptions) to Sanity product documents. Do NOT remove variant/bundle schemas yet; mark them in studio UI as deprecated using field-level 'readOnly' / 'hidden' UI hints and add documentation to explain deprecation.
Phase-staging: Run a small backfill script that copies primary images to new 'media' array for important products and sets 'suggestedProductsEnabled=true' for those products.

Phase B (destructive, optional, follow-up PR): After content is migrated and all UIs switched to new fields, run a migration to remove variant and bundle references from product queries and delete productBundle/productVariant schema files and data.
Rollback: Migration is reversible while we keep deprecated fields. Keep backup export of affected documents before any destructive removal (Sanity export).

unit_tests: GrowerCard.test.tsx - renders name, rating, 'Highly rated' badge, Google Maps link, Cal.com button (when calcomUsername present) and mailto fallback; mocks ChatContext and assert Quick Chat opens and sends starter message.
MediaGallery.test.tsx - renders images + youtube/vimeo handling, fallback placeholder, and keyboard accessibility tests
suggested-products.test.tsx - validates useAutoSuggestedProducts logic and server-side fallback when empty
stock-sync.test.ts - verifies adding to cart triggers local stock decrease and queuing of backend sync; mocks network failure and ensures UI remains consistent
e2e_tests (Playwright): product-contact.spec.ts - existing: ensure Cal.com or mailto fallback present (already present), ensure Quick Chat opens the chat dialog
product-details.spec.ts - new: verify Freshness & Quality, Cooking Guide, Delivery Options, From the Grower sections render; suggested products visible
cart-stock-dynamic.spec.ts - new: add item to cart repeatedly and verify product stock shown reduces accordingly on product page and cart, including when in multiple tabs (local sync).
api_integration: Verify server-side suggested products endpoint (if added) returns consistent deterministic results for e2e tests
Verify websocket/firestore sync for stock events (mocked in tests)
testing_plan.test_coverage_goal: All new code covered by unit tests; e2e covers user flow end-to-end. Maintain current coverage thresholds defined in Jest config.

acceptance_criteria: Product page only shows media (images/videos), descriptive sections, and grower contact UI; variants & bundles are not shown to buyers.
GrowerCard displays name, address (link to Google Maps), rating, and 'Highly rated' badge when rating >= 4.5.
Cal.com booking button opens external Cal.com URL; mailto fallback present when username missing.
Quick Chat button opens site chatbot and sends a starter message referencing the product.
Suggested products appear and are auto-generated when not explicitly overridden.
Adding items to cart reduces displayed stock on product page dynamically; local state syncs with backend/firestore where available (graceful failure when backend unreachable).
Unit tests and Playwright e2e tests pass locally and on CI, and `npm run build` succeeds with zero build-errors.

files_to_add: docs/PRODUCT-PAGE-ENHANCEMENT.md - includes UX rationale, design mockups, Sanity schema changes, migration plan, developer notes
.github/GH-SANITY-MIGRATION.md - step-by-step guide for running backfill/migration scripts and required Sanity tokens
progress.txt update - add entry with story ID and short changelog
docs_and_communication.PR_description_template: Use title + summary + acceptance criteria (copy from this JSON). Link to docs and test run screenshots/traces. Mention not to auto-commit and request review from product & backend teams.

implementation_notes: Do not delete productVariant / productBundle schemas during Phase A; mark deprecated in studio and hide on storefront.
Keep Sanity queries backward-compatible by preferring new 'media' array if present, otherwise fallback to legacy image fields (coalesce pattern already used in codebase).
Stock UI: Use optimistic UI decrement on add-to-cart with background sync to Firestore or backend. On conflict, re-sync and show appropriate toast (success/error).
Suggested products: Prefer server-side TF-IDF / RAG lookup (existing rag-service) for determinism; add client cache for UX responsiveness.
Cal.com embed: Use `@calcom/embed-react` with safe fallback to `mailto:` link when username missing or embed unsupported.
Quick Chat: reuse existing ChatContext; send a short starter message like `Hi, I have a question about <product name> (slug: <slug>)` when opening the chat.
Add feature flag `NEXT_PUBLIC_PRODUCT_USE_NEW_DETAILS=true` so we can gate rollout and revert if needed.
tasks_checklist: Wire components into `src/app/(shop)/product/[slug]/page.tsx` and remove variant/bundle UI references
Add Sanity fields (non-destructive) and update GROQ queries to use `media` and `growerRef`
Add unit tests for new components and update existing tests to mock new hooks/context
Run `npm run build` and `npm run test` and fix any issues until green
Open PR and request code review and Sanity content editor review
risks_and_mitigation: Risk: Removing variants/bundles too early may break sellers who still rely on them. Mitigation: Phase A = hide on storefront + mark deprecated; Phase B = full removal after stakeholder signoff.
Risk: Cal.com vs mailto behavior differs across browsers. Mitigation: tests accept either in e2e and we show both in studio preview for editors.
Risk: Stock race conditions when multiple users buy concurrently. Mitigation: perform final authoritative decrement on backend and show optimistic UI with re-sync/backoff on conflict.

show_on_product_page_requirements.media: Display product images and videos (YouTube/Vimeo/embed). If no media available, show placeholder image.

actions: Quick Chat (opens site chatbot and sends starter message)

show_on_product_page_requirements.no_variants_or_bundles: Do not render variant selectors or bundle purchase UI on storefront product pages (deprecated and hidden).
show_on_product_page_requirements.dynamic_stock: Stock count on product page updates optimistically when items are added to cart and syncs to backend/firestore (with reconciliation on conflict).
show_on_product_page_requirements.suggested_products: Automatically generate 'You May Also Like' suggestions using existing RAG/TF-IDF service, with optional manual overrides in Sanity when editors prefer curated lists.

entries.title: Design & component scaffolding
entries.notes: Added PR JSON plan, created e2e tests for product contact and chatbot, added unit safety tests for search engine and auth sync handling.

entries.title: GrowerCard & MediaGallery components
entries.notes: Extract grower details and media gallery into reusable components and add unit tests.

entries.title: Sanity schema non-destructive changes
entries.notes: Add new fields to product and grower schemas (media, freshnessInfo, deliveryOptions); mark variants/bundles deprecated in Studio with UI hint. Plan backfill script.

entries.title: Stock sync & add-to-cart dynamic behavior
entries.notes: Implement optimistic stock decrement on add-to-cart with background sync and reconciliation; add unit + e2e tests (cart-stock-dynamic.spec.ts).

entries.title: Suggested products auto-generation
entries.notes: Use existing RAG/TF-IDF pipeline to populate suggested products; add hook useAutoSuggestedProducts and tests; allow Sanity override.
